title: CPI Trading Quiz: Can You Spot Smart Money's Move?
description: CPI data drops soon! Test your knowledge on how smart money positions before major inflation releases. Most traders get this wrong and blow accounts during high-impact news.
script: CPI drops tomorrow. Smart money already positioned. Where do they enter? A) Market open B) During news C) Premium discount zones Answer: C! They avoid news volatility completely. Smart money enters early. At premium discount levels. Follow R2F Trading for more tips.
